# daytona_admin_initialize_webhooks (Action)

Initializes Daytona webhooks for an organization through the Daytona admin API. This action requires Daytona admin privileges.



<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID to operate on. Defaults to the provider-level organization ID when configured.
